title: centaurea rhaetica
intro: Centaurea rhaetica, also known as Alpine Knapweed, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. Centaurea rhaetica has been traditionally used to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, offering several health benefits. Herbal preparations of the plant are commonly made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are used to treat colds, flu, and other minor ailments.
